verdicts.corrected_value: Team chat and collaboration platform with a REST API add-on for automating workspace actions (messages, channels, members, webhooks).
verdicts.reasoning: The homepage describes Pumble as a team communication and collaboration tool, which aligns with the recorded description.
The URL for the auth methods returned a 401 error, indicating that the information could not be verified.
The documentation confirms that API keys can be generated via the workspace UI without requiring a paid plan.
The documentation describes a REST API and lists various actions that can be performed, confirming the recorded value.
The ability to install the API add-on and generate API keys via the UI supports the claim that building is feasible after routine key signup.
